audit.summary: Bar Alto has an existing website, and the strongest useful gap is: trust signal is not strong in the first screen.

findings.title: Trust signal is not strong in the first screen
findings.evidence: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
findings.fix: Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise.

findings.title: H1 structure needs cleanup
findings.fix: Use one H1 focused on the primary service/location promise.

findings.title: Image alt text is weak
findings.evidence: 5 image(s) missing alt attribute and 11 image(s) have empty alt.
findings.fix: Add descriptive alt text for content images; keep decorative images empty intentionally.

offerAngle: I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof.
proofPoints: 386 Google reviews listed in Maps scrape
coldMessageDraft: Hey Bar, I was looking at Bar Alto in Brisbane. I noticed your site has a fixable conversion gap: The first captured text block does not clearly surface reviews, warranty, credentials, years, or local proof. I made a quick note on what I would tighten first; happy to send it over if useful.
followUpDraft: Quick follow-up on Bar Alto: the main opportunity I noticed is Add a compact trust strip near the hero: reviews, warranty/licence claims when verified, service area, and response promise.. Worth me sending the short audit?
guardrails: This is a draft, not a final send.
Do not mention review body text.
Do not claim Google API verification until it has been run.
Find email/contact path only after operator accepts the offer angle.
